title: Google Moves Q Day Deadline to 2029
summary: Google has bumped up its Q Day deadline to 2029, warning the industry to move off RSA and EC quickly. This deadline is sooner than previously thought.
body:
Google has announced that it is moving its Q Day deadline to 2029, a significant shift from previous estimates. This move is a warning to the entire industry to transition away from RSA and EC encryption methods more quickly. 

 The implications of this deadline are substantial, as it underscores the urgent need for companies to adapt to quantum-resistant cryptography. Google's announcement serves as a catalyst for the industry to accelerate its efforts in developing and implementing quantum-safe encryption protocols. 

 As the industry reacts to Google's revised deadline, companies are expected to scramble to meet the new timeline. The next steps will involve a flurry of activity, including the development of new quantum-resistant algorithms and the implementation of these algorithms across various platforms. The industry's ability to meet this deadline will be crucial in ensuring the long-term security of online transactions and communications.
twitterThread: 🚨 Google just moved its Q Day deadline to 2029! 🚨 This means the entire industry needs to move off RSA and EC ASAP.
Here's why this matters: quantum computers can break current encryption methods, putting online security at risk. Google's deadline is a wake-up call.
The wild part? This deadline is years sooner than expected. Companies need to act fast to develop quantum-resistant cryptography.
Let that sink in: the industry has just a few years to transition to quantum-safe encryption. The clock is ticking.
This changes everything for online security. Google's Q Day deadline is a catalyst for a quantum-resistant future.
standaloneTweet: Google's Q Day deadline is now 2029! The industry must move off RSA and EC ASAP to ensure online security. What does this mean for the future of cryptography? https://ainformed.dev/articles/google-moves-q-day-deadline-to-2029
